get.description: ViewSet for SkillCategory - read-only, public access.
List public, published skills. Filterable by category, tag, search.

parameters.description: Filter by category slug

parameters.description: A page number within the paginated result set.

post.description:
ViewSet for Skill CRUD and marketplace operations.

Public endpoints: list, retrieve
Authenticated: create, update, delete, star, install, my, versions
Admin: verify, suspend
